query: SELECT id, name, category, "isActive", "sortPosition", address, eircode, description, phone, email FROM stores ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, category, "isActive", "sortPosition", address, eircode, description, phone, email FROM stores ORDER BY id;

rows.name: Spar Balbriggan

rows.description: 24/7 convenience store with groceries, snacks, drinks and essentials

rows.name: Millfield Groceries
